daily.today_energy: Your vibe is magnetic today, Sag. The cosmos is rewiring your intuition—trust those gut feelings that pop up randomly. You're meant to say yes to something that scares you a little.
daily.love: Someone's been thinking about you more than you realize. Whether it's deepening a current connection or a new person entering your orbit, the energy is reciprocal today. Show up authentically.
daily.career: Your creative energy is peaked. This is the moment to pitch that idea you've been sitting on or take initiative on something you actually care about. Your enthusiasm is contagious right now.
daily.health: Your body's asking for movement—not punishment. Dance, walk, stretch, whatever feels good. Your nervous system wants to reset, and gentle intentional activity is the vibe today.

weekly.overview: Mercury's vibes are giving you clarity this week, Sag. You're shedding what no longer serves and stepping into your power. Trust the timing—even the slow moments are building something real.
weekly.love: Venus is whispering sweet nothings, but the real magic is in being authentically you. Whether single or coupled, your vibe is magnetic rn. Don't overthink it—just show up as you are.
weekly.career: Your creative energy is peaked. This is the week to pitch that idea or pivot toward something that actually fulfills you. The universe is backing your boldness, so lean in.
weekly.health: Your body's asking for movement and rest in equal measure. Find joy in how your physical self feels rather than chasing goals. Dance, walk, breathe—simple rituals hit different right now.
